properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Rushing wind blow through this temple Blowing out the dust within Come and breathe your breath upon me I've been born again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Holy Spirit, I surrender Take me where you want to go Plant me by your living waters Plant me deep so I can grow

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, you're the one, who'll set my spirit free Use me Lord, glorify, your Holy Name through me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Separate me from this world Lord Sanctify my life for you Daily change me to your image Help me bear good fruit

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Every day you're drawing closer Trials come to test my faith But when all is said and done Lord You know, it's been worth the wait

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Rushing wind blow through this temple Blowing out the dust within Come and breathe your breath upon me For I've been born again
